title: Candy Kittens Vegan Sweets DISCOVERY Selection (5 x 140g), Vegan Chewy Sweets Bundle - 5 Packs - Wild Strawberry, Sour Watermelon, Shox, Wanderlust & LOVES, Perfect Vegetarian Gifts
features: GOURMET VEGAN SWEETS: Whether looking for delightful snacks, thoughtful vegan gifts, or a sweet treat, Candy Kittens gourmet sweet bundles are the perfect choice for indulgence without compromise

FIVE AMAZING FLAVOURS: Wild Strawberry - intense strawberry for classic sweet lovers, Sour Watermelon - one-in-a-melon flavour, Shox - sour strawberry & apple, Wanderlust - our first ever gourmet chew, & LOVES – a mixed fruit explosion of flavour
NO NASTIES: Candy Kittens vegan and vegetarian sweets never contain gelatine, or artificial colours and flavours! Our jelly sweets recipe gets its bounce from plant power
MADE WITH FRUIT JUICE: Candy Kittens sweets are coloured and flavoured with responsibly sourced, plant based concentrates of sweet potato, turmeric, spirulina, and more
FRUITY SWEETS MIX: Dive into our pick and mix bags of sweets, featuring a lively mix of chewy and fruity flavours that will tantalise your taste buds with every bit
description: Product Description Feed your sense of adventure with the Candy Kittens DISCOVERY Vegan Chewy Sweets Bundle! Embark on a sensory adventure into a world of flavour with our discoveryBundle — the ultimate gourmet vegan sweets mix. Indulge in one of our fantastic bundles, featuring five fantastic flavours: Wild Strawberry, which tingles the taste buds with an intense hit of strawberry. A firm favourite with all classic sweet lovers. Sour Watermelon,one-in-a-melon flavour, giving you that perfect hit of sweet and sour. Shox, an irresistible mix of Sour Strawberry and Sour Apple - leaving a Shox on your tastebuds! Wanderlust, irresistible mix of Strawberry, Orange, Blackcurrant, & Passion Fruit chew sweets. LOVES, a fruity explosion of blueberry, cherry, orange and strawberry gummies . Our Candy Kittens sweets are more than just treats; they're a testament to our values. Crafted from natural flavours and our special vegan recipe, they embody our commitment to transparency and quality. We source our concentrates responsibly from plants like sweet potato, turmeric, and spirulina, ensuring our sweets are free from gelatine, and artificial colours and flavours. Designed for the conscious consumer, each bite is a step towards a better world. Be a part of our mission to revolutionise the snack industry! Since we made our recipe plant powered in 2018 and our B Corp status in 2022, Candy Kittens has been a force for change. Our goal is simple: to deliver high-quality, delightful sweets without compromise. With every bag of our vegan chewy sweets, we invite you to join us in making a positive impact. Candy Kittens—where gourmet flavour meets ethical indulgence. Unwrap a bag today and taste the difference! Ingredients Sugar, Glucose syrup, Modified starch, Dextrose, Watermelon juice from concentrate , Strawberry juice from concentrate, Coconut water from concentrate, Apple juice from concentrate, Fructose-glucose syrup, Maltodextrin, Acids: malic acid, citric acid, lactic acid, Hydrolysed pea protein, Potato protein, Natural flavourings,Natural orange flavouring), Acidity regulators: sodium malates, calcium carbonate, sodium potassium, tartrate, potassium citrates, Gelling agent: pectins, Fruit and plant concentrates: black carrot, pumpkin, apple, sweet potato, turmeric, safflower, radish, blackcurrant, lemon, Spirulina concentrate,Sunflower oil, Glazing agent: carnauba wax (from responsible sources) Manufacturer Contact Information ‎CKHQ 7 Lyric Square, London, W6 0ED See more
